name: AERWINS Technologies Inc. Warrant
summary: AERWINS Technologies Inc. Warrant is a warrant to purchase shares of AERWINS Technologies Inc., a company that designs, engineers, manufactures, and distributes 3D printers and related products. The warrants give the holder the right to buy AERWINS Technologies shares at a specified price within a certain period. AERWINS Technologies is headquartered in Costa Mesa, California.
